metlife.name: MetLife Stadium
metlife.address: One MetLife Stadium Drive, East Rutherford, NJ 07073, USA

directions.by_train: Take Meadowlands Rail Line B from Secaucus Junction or Hoboken Terminal. Trains run every 10 min on match days, starting 4 hours before kickoff. Alight at MetLife Stadium Light Rail Terminal (far left of venue).
directions.by_bus: NJ Transit Bus Route 160 from Port Authority Bus Terminal (Manhattan) directly to MetLife Stadium on match days.
directions.by_car_from_manhattan: Lincoln Tunnel → NJ Route 3 West → Meadowlands Sports Complex exit. Follow signs. ~30 min drive.
directions.by_car_from_newark_airport: NJ Turnpike North → Exit 16W → Route 3 East → Meadowlands exit. ~20 min drive.
directions.by_rideshare: Uber/Lyft drop-off zone in Lot K (northeast corner). Follow blue rideshare signs.

Gate A.features: Step-free entry, ADA accessible, VIP entrance, wheelchair ramps, automatic doors

Gate C.features: Ticket booth area, frequently congested — fans should use Gate A or D instead

Gate D.features: Stairs access, VIP entrance, fast entry, designated smoking area outside

parking.general: Lots A, B, D, E, G, J, K, L, P — $40 per vehicle (pre-purchase on Ticketmaster)
parking.accessible_ada: Lots E and G (closest to Gate A). Free for valid ADA permit holders.
parking.ev_charging: Lot C — 12 Tesla Superchargers, 8 universal Level 2 chargers. First-come, first-served.
parking.tailgating: Lots E, G, J, K, L. Charcoal and propane grills allowed.

sustainability.green_fan_pass: Unlocked by logging transit distances below 40 miles or using train transit

food_courts.level_1: Sections 101-140, main food court between Sections 115-120
food_courts.options: American, Mexican, Asian, Halal, Kosher, Vegan/Vegetarian
food_courts.premium_dining: MetLife Club Restaurant (Sections 207-211, premium tickets only)

azteca.name: Estadio Azteca
azteca.address: Calzada de Tlalpan 3465, Coyoacán, 04650 Mexico City, Mexico

directions.by_train: Take Metro Line 2 (Blue) to Tasqueña station, then Light Rail (Tren Ligero) to Estadio Azteca station. ~5 min walk from station to Gate A.
directions.by_bus: Metrobús Line 1 to Doctor Gálvez stop, then 15 min walk south. Or take RTP buses from Chapultepec.
directions.by_car_from_manhattan: From Centro Histórico: Calzada de Tlalpan south for ~12 km. ~30 min drive.
directions.by_car_from_newark_airport: From Airport (MEX): Viaducto Miguel Alemán → Calzada de Tlalpan south. ~45 min drive.
directions.by_rideshare: Uber/DiDi drop-off at North Plaza (Gate A). Follow orange rideshare signs.

Gate A.features: Main entrance, metro access, rideshare drop-off nearby

Gate B.features: ADA accessible ramp entry, automatic sliding gates

Gate D.features: Escalator and stairs access, VIP entry

parking.general: Lots 1-5 surrounding the stadium — 500 MXN per vehicle
parking.accessible_ada: Lot 2 (closest to Gate B accessible entrance). Free for permit holders.
parking.ev_charging: Lot 1 — 6 universal Level 2 chargers. First-come, first-served.
parking.tailgating: Lots 1 and 3. Propane grills allowed. No open flames after kickoff.

sustainability.green_fan_pass: Unlocked by taking Light Rail or using EV parking

food_courts.options: Mexican street food, tacos, tortas, standard American fare, vegan options
food_courts.premium_dining: Azteca Club Lounge (Sections 212-216, premium tickets only)

bcplace.name: BC Place
bcplace.address: 777 Pacific Boulevard, Vancouver, BC V6B 4Y8, Canada

directions.by_train: Take the Expo Line or Canada Line SkyTrain to Stadium-Chinatown Station. BC Place is a 2 min walk from the station exit.
directions.by_bus: Multiple TransLink bus routes stop at Pacific Boulevard. Routes 3, 8, 19 recommended.
directions.by_car_from_manhattan: Head south on Cambie Street → turn left on Pacific Boulevard. BC Place is on your right. ~10 min drive.
directions.by_car_from_newark_airport: Canada Line SkyTrain directly to Stadium-Chinatown (~25 min). By car: Grant McConachie Way → Highway 99 → Cambie Bridge → Pacific Boulevard. ~30 min drive.
directions.by_rideshare: Uber/Lyft drop-off at Terry Fox Plaza (Gate B area). Follow green rideshare signs.

Gate A.features: Main entrance, closest to SkyTrain station, VIP lanes

Gate B.features: ADA accessible, rideshare drop-off nearby, step-free entry

Gate D.features: Frequently congested, stair-access only, fans should use Gate A or B instead

parking.general: Nearby parkades: Pacific Boulevard Parkade, Expo Lot — $25-40 CAD
parking.accessible_ada: Pacific Boulevard Parkade Level 1 (closest to Gate B accessible entrance)
parking.ev_charging: Lot G — 8 universal Level 2 chargers. First-come, first-served.
parking.tailgating: No tailgating allowed in BC Place parking areas due to city bylaws.

sustainability.green_fan_pass: Unlocked by SkyTrain transit or EV parking

food_courts.options: Canadian classics, poutine, Asian fusion, vegan, gluten-free
food_courts.premium_dining: BC Club Lounge (Sections 208-212, club tickets only)
